description: Create summary figure showing domain architectures, scaffold context, and evidence against GO:0005201
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(14, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [2, 2, 3]})

# Panel A: Domain architecture comparison
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_title("A. Domain Architecture: A0A2G9RZF1 vs PCPE-1 vs BMP-1/Tolloid", fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Color scheme
colors = {'Signal': '#FFD700', 'CUB': '#4169E1', 'EGF': '#32CD32', 'NTR': '#FF6347', 
          'Astacin': '#FF4500', 'Propeptide': '#DDA0DD', 'Other': '#D3D3D3'}

def draw_protein(ax, y, length, domains, label, total_scale=1100):
    # Background
    ax.barh(y, length/total_scale, height=0.3, color='#E8E8E8', left=0, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
    for start, end, dtype in domains:
        ax.barh(y, (end-start)/total_scale, height=0.3, left=start/total_scale, 
                color=colors.get(dtype, '#888'), edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
        mid = (start + end) / 2 / total_scale
        if (end - start) > 50:
            ax.text(mid, y, dtype, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')
    ax.text(-0.02, y, f"{label}\n({length} aa)", ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8, 
            transform=ax.get_yaxis_transform())

draw_protein(ax1, 3, 156, [(1,30,'Signal'), (31,147,'CUB')], 'A0A2G9RZF1')
draw_protein(ax1, 2, 449, [(1,25,'Signal'), (37,149,'CUB'), (159,273,'CUB'), (318,437,'NTR')], 'PCPE-1\n(Q15113)')
draw_protein(ax1, 1, 986, [(1,21,'Signal'), (22,128,'Propeptide'), (129,264,'Astacin'), 
                           (267,381,'CUB'), (382,417,'EGF'), (418,530,'CUB'), (534,649,'CUB')], 'BMP-1\n(P13497)')
draw_protein(ax1, 0, 1007, [(1,25,'Signal'), (26,130,'Propeptide'), (131,267,'Astacin'),
                            (270,384,'CUB'), (385,420,'EGF'), (421,533,'CUB'), (537,652,'CUB'),
                            (653,688,'EGF'), (691,803,'CUB'), (807,919,'CUB')], 'mTLD\n(Q8JI28)')

ax1.set_xlim(-0.01, 1.02)
ax1.set_ylim(-0.5, 3.8)
ax1.set_yticks([])
ax1.set_xlabel('Relative position', fontsize=9)

# Legend
legend_patches = [mpatches.Patch(color=v, label=k, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5) 
                  for k, v in colors.items() if k != 'Other']
ax1.legend(handles=legend_patches, loc='upper right', fontsize=7, ncol=3)

# Panel B: Scaffold gene fragment diagram
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title("B. Scaffold KV928989: Three ORFs Likely From One BMP-1/Tolloid-like Gene", fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Draw scaffold
ax2.barh(0, 1, height=0.15, color='#F0F0F0', edgecolor='gray')
ax2.text(0.5, 0.2, 'Scaffold KV928989 (134 kb)', ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9, style='italic')

# Assembly gaps (schematic)
for gx in [0.04, 0.07, 0.15, 0.3, 0.45]:
    ax2.plot([gx, gx], [-0.075, 0.075], color='red', linewidth=2, alpha=0.5)
    
# Gene fragments (schematic positions)
frag_data = [
    (0.1, 0.12, 'A0A2G9RZF1\n(CUB)', '#4169E1'),
    (0.22, 0.18, 'A0A2G9RZH1\n(EGF+CUB)', '#32CD32'),
    (0.48, 0.20, 'A0A2G9RZI6\n(CUB+EGF+CUB)\nFRAGMENT', '#FF4500'),
]
for start, width, label, color in frag_data:
    ax2.barh(-0.4, width, height=0.3, left=start, color=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, alpha=0.8)
    ax2.text(start + width/2, -0.4, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')

# Arrows suggesting they belong together
ax2.annotate('', xy=(0.22, -0.55), xytext=(0.22, -0.55),)
ax2.plot([0.15, 0.22], [-0.7, -0.7], 'k--', linewidth=1)
ax2.plot([0.40, 0.48], [-0.7, -0.7], 'k--', linewidth=1)
ax2.text(0.35, -0.75, '? Single BMP-1/tolloid-like gene ?', ha='center', va='top', fontsize=9, 
         style='italic', color='red', fontweight='bold')

ax2.set_xlim(-0.01, 1.01)
ax2.set_ylim(-1.0, 0.4)
ax2.set_yticks([])
ax2.set_xticks([])

# Legend for gaps
ax2.plot([0.85], [0.2], 'r-', linewidth=2, alpha=0.5)
ax2.text(0.87, 0.2, 'Assembly gap', va='center', fontsize=8, color='red')

# Panel C: GO annotation decision tree
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.set_title("C. Evidence Against GO:0005201 Annotation", fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax3.axis('off')

# Decision table as text
table_data = [
    ['Evidence Line', 'Finding', 'Impact on GO:0005201'],
    ['GO term semantics', 'GO:0005201 = structural ECM (collagens, elastin)', 'REFUTES: CUB ≠ structural'],
    ['PCPE-1 actual function', 'IDA: peptidase activator + collagen binding', 'REFUTES: wrong source function'],
    ['PCPE-1 GO:0005201 evidence', 'Only RCA (computational), not IDA', 'WEAKENS: non-experimental'],
    ['Domain architecture', 'Single CUB cannot do PCPE-1 activity', 'REFUTES: function not transferable'],
    ['Genomic context', 'Fragment of BMP-1/tolloid gene', 'REFUTES: not standalone protein'],
    ['Tolloid CUB function', 'CUB = substrate recognition for protease', 'REFUTES: regulatory, not structural'],
]

table = ax3.table(cellText=table_data[1:], colLabels=table_data[0], 
                  loc='center', cellLoc='left',
                  colWidths=[0.25, 0.4, 0.35])
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8)
table.scale(1, 1.5)

# Color the header
for j in range(3):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#2F4F4F')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')
# Color the impact column
for i in range(1, 7):
    table[i, 2].set_facecolor('#FFE4E1')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: evidence_summary.png")
